docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT PENDERGAST, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF ANN VODE, PROCESS SERVER RE: NOT FOUND - RETURN OF SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00 FILED BY DEFENDANT PENDERGAST, MICHAEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING AND QUALITY ASSURANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
